creator: lumiwa@gmail.com
text:
I upgrade GNOME 3.16 to 3.18 and I have a problem with Evolution 3.18.4. When I try to open Edit-.Preferences, Evolution crashed. There are no errors. If I start from Terminal I got:
Gtk-Message: Failed to load module "canberra-gtk-module"
Gtk-Message: Failed to load module "canberra-gtk-module"
Vector smash protection is enabled.
Gtk-Message: GtkDialog mapped without a transient parent. This is discouraged.
Segmentation fault (core dumped)

Thank you.
